name: aura-protocol
description: Confidential AI Data Marketplace on Aleo - Production Ready

scripts.dev: npm install && cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm install && cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.start: npm install && cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run start
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run lint
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run type-check
